creator: ade@lovett.com
text:
On Thu, Feb 17, 2000 at 07:15:16PM -0500, oleg@ogurok.com wrote:
>
> [snip]
> 
>  gmake[1]: Leaving directory `/usr/ports/print/gnomeprint/work/gnome-print-0.10'
>  /usr/libexec/elf/ld: cannot open -lungif: No such file or directory


graphics/imlib and x11/gnomelibs were updated a few days ago to
use libungif instead of giflib.

Make sure that you have rev 1.60 of graphics/imlib/Makefile
- if not, bring your ports tree up to date and rebuild graphics/imlib,
which will bring in libungif.

-aDe

-- 
Ade Lovett, Austin, TX.
